headlines: Solana DeFi exchange Drift hit by $285M exploit; funds bridged to Ethereum
Circle and USDC come under fire after large cross‑chain outflows during Drift hack
Coinbase says CLARITY Act deal on stablecoin yields is 'very close' (Senate action expected)
Coinbase wins conditional OCC approval to charter Coinbase National Trust (Apr 2, 2026)
BlackRock’s IBIT posts massive daily volume — ETF trading rivals major exchanges (Kaiko data / Apr 2, 2026 reportings)

articles.title: Solana DeFi exchange Drift hit by $285M exploit; funds bridged to Ethereum
articles.summary: Drift Protocol, a Solana-based decentralized perpetuals exchange, was exploited on April 1–2, 2026 with roughly $280–$285 million stolen. Attackers moved large portions of the loot across chains and into ETH quickly, making this one of 2026’s biggest DeFi hacks and triggering an immediate security and liquidity shock across Solana DeFi.

articles.title: Circle and USDC come under fire after large cross‑chain outflows during Drift hack
articles.summary: Researchers and on‑chain investigators said millions of USDC were bridged from Solana to Ethereum using Circle’s CCTP in the hours after the Drift exploit, and criticized Circle’s response time to flag or freeze those transfers while the attack unfolded.

articles.title: Coinbase: CLARITY Act deal on stablecoin yield rules ‘very close’
articles.summary: Coinbase’s chief legal officer said on April 1–2 that lawmakers are nearing an agreement on the CLARITY Act’s disputed stablecoin‑yield language and that a Senate Banking Committee markup could follow soon — a development markets are watching because it would shape US crypto market rules.

articles.title: Coinbase gets conditional OCC approval to charter Coinbase National Trust
articles.summary: On April 2, Coinbase announced it received conditional approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to charter Coinbase National Trust Company — a regulatory step that could expand Coinbase’s custody and trust services in the US.

articles.title: BlackRock’s IBIT trading volume now rivals big exchanges, data show
articles.summary: Data cited by market trackers show BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) trading between about $16B–$18B in daily volume — levels that approach big crypto exchange spot volumes and signal ETFs are reshaping liquidity in the Bitcoin market.
articles.source: Kaiko data reported by DailyCoin / BeInCrypto (reported Apr 2, 2026)

articles.title: Bitcoin snaps five‑month losing streak with March close; price action fragile
articles.summary: Bitcoin posted its first positive monthly close since October, ending March on a modest gain, but analysts warn the rally is fragile amid macro uncertainty and continued ETF flow swings that can push fast moves in spot BTC.

articles.title: Solana prices and DEX volumes wobble after big Drift exploit
articles.summary: The $285M Drift exploit hit Solana‑based DeFi hard: trading volumes and trust in some Solana DEX vaults fell and SOL price action showed sharp short‑term volatility as users pulled liquidity and DeFi counterparties reassessed risk.

articles.title: US prosecutors forfeit $600K in Tether tied to phishing; law enforcement keeps pressure on crypto crime
articles.summary: A US attorney in Connecticut announced the forfeiture of about $600,000 in USDT linked to a phishing scam, illustrating ongoing law‑enforcement efforts to seize stolen stablecoins and return funds to victims.
